boardName.en: Maharashtra Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (MahaBOCW)
boardName.hi: महाराष्ट्र इमारत व इतर बांधकाम कामगार कल्याणकारी मंडळ (MahaBOCW)
boardName.mr: महाराष्ट्र इमारत व इतर बांधकाम कामगार कल्याणकारी मंडळ (MahaBOCW)

sourceNote: Amounts taken from the official MahaBOCW welfare schemes page (mahabocw.in/en/welfare-schemes). Verify before any official/legal use as boards revise amounts periodically.

feeNote.en: Registration is effectively free / a nominal fee. Renewal applies yearly.
feeNote.hi: नोंदणी मोफत / नाममात्र शुल्क. दरवर्षी नूतनीकरण.
feeNote.mr: नोंदणी मोफत / नाममात्र शुल्क. दरवर्षी नूतनीकरण.

name.en: Register with the Board (Bandhkam Kamgar Nondani)

description.en: Your gateway to every other benefit. Free / nominal fee, valid 1 year, renewable. Needed before you can claim anything else.
description.hi: इतर सर्व लाभांचे प्रवेशद्वार. मोफत / नाममात्र शुल्क, 1 वर्ष वैध, नूतनीकरण करता येते.
description.mr: इतर सर्व लाभांचे प्रवेशद्वार. मोफत / नाममात्र शुल्क, 1 वर्ष वैध, नूतनीकरण करता येते.

howToClaim: Go to mahabocw.in and open Worker Registration
Check eligibility, then fill the form with Aadhaar + mobile number
Upload documents and your 90-day work certificate
Book the verification appointment (free — beware of agents charging money)
Collect your registration card once verified

description.en: Annual scholarship for your children's schooling and higher education. ₹2,500/yr (class 1-7), ₹5,000/yr (class 8-10, needs 75% attendance), up to ₹1,00,000 for graduation/professional courses. Max 2 children.
description.hi: आपके बच्चों की पढ़ाई के लिए सालाना शिष्यवृत्ती. कक्षा 1-7: ₹2,500, कक्षा 8-10: ₹5,000, उच्च शिक्षा के लिए ₹1,00,000 तक. अधिकतम 2 बच्चे.
description.mr: तुमच्या मुलांच्या शिक्षणासाठी वार्षिक शिष्यवृत्ती. इयत्ता 1-7: ₹2,500, इयत्ता 8-10: ₹5,000, उच्च शिक्षणासाठी ₹1,00,000 पर्यंत. जास्तीत जास्त 2 मुले.

howToClaim: Log in at mahabocw.in and open Schemes → Education Scholarship
Download the 2026 Self-Declaration form (old format is auto-rejected)
Fill the form per child (max 2) and attach school documents
Submit online or at the Board office and track status

description.en: Cash support during pregnancy and childbirth for registered women workers and wives of registered male workers (up to 2 children).
description.hi: गर्भावस्था और प्रसव के दौरान नकद सहायता — पंजीकृत महिला कामगार और पंजीकृत पुरुष कामगार की पत्नी के लिए (2 बच्चों तक).
description.mr: गर्भधारणा व प्रसूतीदरम्यान रोख मदत — नोंदणीकृत महिला कामगार व नोंदणीकृत पुरुष कामगाराच्या पत्नीसाठी (2 मुलांपर्यंत).

howToClaim: Open Schemes → Maternity Benefit on mahabocw.in
Attach the medical certificate and birth certificate
Submit within the allowed window after childbirth

description.en: ₹51,000 towards the marriage of a registered worker's daughter.
description.hi: पंजीकृत कामगार की बेटी के विवाह के लिए ₹51,000.

howToClaim: Open Schemes → Marriage Assistance on mahabocw.in
Attach marriage certificate, invitation and photos
Submit within the allowed window after the marriage

description.en: Up to ₹2,00,000 for permanent disability (75%+), certified by a competent medical board.

documents: 75% disability certificate from competent medical board
howToClaim: Open Schemes → Disability Assistance on mahabocw.in
Attach the disability certificate and medical records
Submit online or at the Board office

description.en: Up to ₹1,00,000 for treatment of critical illness for the worker or family, plus free cashless treatment under Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jan Arogya Yojana.
description.hi: कामगार या परिवार के गंभीर इलाज के लिए ₹1,00,000 तक, साथ ही MJPJAY के तहत मुफ्त इलाज.
description.mr: कामगार किंवा कुटुंबाच्या गंभीर आजाराच्या उपचारासाठी ₹1,00,000 पर्यंत, तसेच MJPJAY अंतर्गत मोफत उपचार.

howToClaim: Open Schemes → Medical Assistance on mahabocw.in
Attach reports, prescription and hospital bills
Submit online or at the Board office

description.en: ₹5,00,000 to the family/nominee in case of accidental death (₹2,00,000 for natural death; ₹10,000 funeral assistance).

howToClaim: Nominee opens Schemes → Death Benefit on mahabocw.in
Attach death certificate, FIR/post-mortem and heir certificate
Submit at the Board office

description.en: Financial assistance for house construction/repair, linked to Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana eligibility.
description.hi: घर बनाने/मरम्मत के लिए आर्थिक सहायता, PMAY पात्रता से जुड़ी.
description.mr: घर बांधणी/दुरुस्तीसाठी आर्थिक मदत, PMAY पात्रतेशी संलग्न.

documents: PMAY eligibility letter from competent officer
howToClaim: Open Schemes → Housing Assistance on mahabocw.in
Attach PMAY eligibility letter and ownership documents
Submit at the Board office

description.en: Direct benefit (₹2,000-₹5,000 via DBT) and tools/essential kits to help you work safely and earn more.
description.hi: DBT के जरिए ₹2,000-₹5,000 और काम के लिए औजार/किट.

howToClaim: Open Schemes → Tool / Essential Kit on mahabocw.in
Attach self-declaration and quotation
Submit online or at the Board office

description.en: Monthly pension after age 60 for members with the required years of membership. Plan ahead — register young so you qualify later.
description.hi: 60 वर्ष के बाद मासिक पेंशन (आवश्यक सदस्यता वर्षों के साथ). जल्दी नोंदणी करें ताकि बाद में पात्र बनें.
description.mr: 60 वर्षांनंतर मासिक निवृत्तीवेतन (आवश्यक सदस्यता वर्षांसह). लवकर नोंदणी करा म्हणजे पुढे पात्र व्हाल.

documents: Registration card with required membership years
howToClaim: After turning 60, open Schemes → Pension on mahabocw.in
Attach age proof and membership record
Submit a life certificate every year to continue pension
